description:
Cross-platform desktop application for translation based on ChatGPT API.


OCR works on macOS again
- OCR on macOS now uses the built-in screenshot selection with native Apple Vision recognition, replacing a broken helper binary that failed silently
- Fixed OCR randomly doing nothing on all platforms: the capture window suspended its own logic before recognition could run
- Retrying OCR after a failed attempt now works instead of silently doing nothing
- macOS will ask for Screen Recording permission on first use
